text:
Market today: The tech and chip sector has some specific positive news with AMD launching a new AI system to rival Nvidia, and Iren landing big cloud deals. This provides some company-specific tailwinds amidst an otherwise quiet broader market for your kind of names.

Your holdings: SOXL is a major concern, down over 43% and a leveraged ETF that decays. SPAL, another leveraged ETF, is also down significantly at 47%. Both are particularly painful on margin. QQQ, SMH, and QQQI are all showing minor losses and are marked to TRIM.

Watch: Keep a close eye on the chip sector for ripple effects from AMD's new AI system. Also, monitor your leveraged positions closely for any further downside.

Bottom line: Prioritize managing your leveraged positions and stay alert to shifts within the chip industry.
plays: SOXL is a "SELL" and down -43.16%. Review your risk on this leveraged position and consider trimming to manage losses.
SPAL, a new leveraged ETF, is down -47.24%. Re-evaluate this volatile holding to prevent further amplified drawdowns on margin.
Your CRWD is up +13.72%. Scanner suggests ACCUMULATE at 203.22-202.71 with a stop at 201.01. Consider adding if it hits.
